Rows: CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN isOnlineOnly = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(id)

gt_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN isOnlineOnly = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(id) FROM sets WHERE code IN ( SELECT setCode FROM set_translations WHERE language = 'Portuguese (Brazil)' )

Rows: CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN s.isOnlineOnly = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(s.id)

pred_sql:
SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN s.isOnlineOnly = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(s.id) 
FROM set_translations st
JOIN sets s ON st.setCode = s.code
WHERE st.language = 'Portuguese (Brazil)';
question: For all the set of cards that has Brazil Portuguese translation, what is the percentage of them are only available online?
